title: Leaderboards
description: Compete for the highest score in ZXSnake and compare your performance with players around the world through Apple Game Center.

images.caption: Compete for higher scores and climb the leaderboard.

sections.heading: Compete for the Highest Score
paragraphs: ZXSnake includes Apple Game Center leaderboards where you can compare your best scores with players around the world.
Every game is another opportunity to improve your personal best, climb the rankings, and see how far your skills can take you.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Is a New Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Compete for higher scores, beat your personal best, and climb the leaderboard.
body: Every game of ZXSnake helps you improve your score and move closer to the top of the leaderboard. As your planning, reactions, and survival skills improve, so will your position in the rankings.
Combined with achievements and BarkinMad Coins, leaderboards give you another reason to keep coming back for one more game.
bullets: Works alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every game is another opportunity to climb the leaderboard.

summary: Compete for higher scores, track your progress, and challenge yourself through Apple Game Center leaderboards.
